long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between msr01a.tok05 et-1/0/13 <-> mss28a.sr02.tok05 Et53/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19805
short_description: msr01a.tok05 et-1/0/13 <-> mss28a.sr02.tok05 Et53/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link flapped once. Will continue to monitor the link and proceed with layer 1 troubleshooting if it flaps again.
